parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant "用户" as user
participant "ms-trade" as ms_trade
participant "subscribe-service" as subscribe_service
participant "ctu" as ctu
participant "payment-service" as payment_service
participant "cpw" as cpw
participant "payment" as payment
participant "upm" as upm
participant "public-service" as public_service
participant "product" as product
participant "subscribe" as subscribe
participant "charging" as charging
participant "order" as order
participant "proxy" as proxy
participant "campaign" as campaign

user -> ms_trade : wapPurchase 点播图书
ms_trade -> subscribe_service : purchaseObj 点播图书
subscribe_service -> ctu : purchaseObj 点播图书

alt 连续包月
    ctu -> ctu : queryContinuousTokensMemCache 查询连续订阅token
    ctu <-- ctu : queryContinuousTokensMemCache 返回查询连续订阅token的响应
    alt token不存在或者已失效
        ctu -> ctu : updateContinuousTokensMemCache 保存连续订阅token
        ctu <-- ctu : updateContinuousTokensMemCache 返回保存连续订阅token的响应
    end
end

ctu -> payment_service : paymentServices.getPaymentAccountInfo 查询支付号
payment_service -> cpw : paymentService.getPaymentAccountInfo 查询支付号
payment_service <-- cpw : paymentService.getPaymentAccountInfo 返回查询支付号的响应
ctu <-- payment_service : paymentServices.getPaymentAccountInfo 返回查询支付号的响应

alt 支付号不存在
    ctu -> upm : iUserService.getAccountInfo 查询账号的手机号
    ctu <-- upm : iUserService.getAccountInfo 返回查询账号的手机号的响应
    ctu -> public_service : matchNumberSegment 查询手机号运营商
    ctu <-- public_service : matchNumberSegment 返回查询手机号运营商的响应
    ctu -> payment_service : paymentServices.paymentAccountManagement 注册支付号
    payment_service -> cpw : paymentService.getPaymentAccountInfo 查询支付号
    payment_service <-- cpw : paymentService.getPaymentAccountInfo 返回查询支付号的响应
    payment_service -> cpw : paymentService.createPaymentAccount 创建支付号
    payment_service <-- cpw : paymentService.createPaymentAccount 返回创建支付号的响应
    ctu <-- payment_service : paymentServices.paymentAccountManagement 返回注册支付号的响应
end

ctu -> upm : isUserWhiteList 查询用户是否是白名单用户
ctu <-- upm : isUserWhiteList 返回查询用户是否是白名单用户的响应

alt 用户是白名单用户
    subscribe_service <-- ctu : purchaseObj 点播图书返回null
end

ctu -> public_service : matchNumberSegment 查询手机号省份id和城市id
ctu <-- public_service : matchNumberSegment 返回查询手机号省份id和城市id的响应
ctu -> product : ereadItemQueryService.fetchItemInfo 查询产品信息
ctu <-- product : ereadItemQueryService.fetchItemInfo 返回查询产品信息的响应

alt 图书未售卖或当前渠道没有销售该折扣的售卖权
    subscribe_service <-- ctu : purchaseObj 点播图书返回24900
end

alt 版本订阅
    alt 赠送
        ctu -> subscribe : itemService.fetchItemSubscription 查询已有订阅信息
        ctu <-- subscribe : itemService.fetchItemSubscription 返回已有订阅信息
        alt 上一个赠送有效期内续期
            ctu -> subscribe : itemService.subscribe 更新已有订阅信息结束时间
            ctu <-- subscribe : 返回响应
            subscribe_service <-- ctu : purchaseObj 点播图书返回null
        end
        ctu -> subscribe : itemService.authenticate 内容鉴权(版本鉴权)
        ctu <-- subscribe : itemService.authenticate 返回鉴权信息
        alt 版本鉴权通过
            subscribe_service <-- ctu : purchaseObj 点播图书返回24900
        end
        ctu -> charging : eventCalculatorService.calculatePrice 取图书进行折价
        ctu <-- charging : eventCalculatorService.calculatePrice 返回折价结果
        alt 喜马拉雅渠道马扣费
            ctu -> payment_service : 最终价格是喜马拉雅折扣价格\npaymentServices.autoAdaptedPayChannels 适配支付方式
            ctu <-- payment_service : paymentServices.autoAdaptedPayChannels 返回适配支付方式的响应
        end
        alt 喜马拉雅渠道非马扣费
            ctu -> payment_service : paymentServices.autoAdaptedPayChannels 适配支付方式
            ctu <-- payment_service : paymentServices.autoAdaptedPayChannels 返回适配支付方式的响应
            ctu -> ctu : 根据系统配置项与支付方式重发计发,网银,神仙币客户端,神仙币wap时折扣,\n在原最终价格上再计算一次折扣
        end
        ctu -> order : orderManagementService.createOrder 创建订单
        ctu <-- order : orderManagementService.createOrder 返回创建订单的响应
    end
    alt 非赠送
        ctu -> subscribe : itemService.authenticate 内容鉴权(版本鉴权)
        ctu <-- subscribe : itemService.authenticate 返回鉴权信息
        alt 版本鉴权通过
            subscribe_service <-- ctu : purchaseObj 点播图书返回24900
        end
        ctu -> charging : eventCalculatorService.calculatePrice 取图书进行折价
        ctu <-- charging : eventCalculatorService.calculatePrice 返回折价结果
        alt 喜马拉雅渠道马扣费
            ctu -> payment_service : 最终价格是喜马拉雅折扣价格\npaymentServices.autoAdaptedPayChannels 适配支付方式
            ctu <-- payment_service : paymentServices.autoAdaptedPayChannels 返回适配支付方式的响应
        end
        alt 喜马拉雅渠道非马扣费
            ctu -> payment_service : paymentServices.autoAdaptedPayChannels 适配支付方式
            ctu <-- payment_service : paymentServices.autoAdaptedPayChannels 返回适配支付方式的响应
            ctu -> ctu : 根据系统配置项与支付方式重发计发,网银,神仙币客户端,神仙币wap时折扣,\n在原最终价格上再计算一次折扣
        end
        ctu -> order : orderManagementService.createOrder 创建订单
        ctu <-- order : orderManagementService.createOrder 返回创建订单的响应
    end
    ctu -> order : orderManagementService.submitOrder 提交订单
    ctu <-- order : orderManagementService.submitOrder 返回提交订单的响应
    alt payOrder流程
        ctu -> payment_service : orderPaymentService.payOrder 支付订单
        alt 支付方式是同步支付
            payment_service -> subscribe : itemService.batchSubscribe 批量订购
            payment_service <-- subscribe : itemService.batchSubscribe 返回批量订购的响应
            payment_service -> payment : paymentServices.directPayment 扣费
            payment_service <-- payment : paymentServices.directPayment 返回扣费的响应
            alt 支付成功
                alt 喜马拉雅渠道马扣费
                    payment_service -> proxy : ximalaya/distribute 同步喜马拉雅订购关系(多章节加任务队列异步处理)
                    payment_service <-- proxy : ximalaya/distribute 返回同步喜马拉雅订购关系响应
                end
                payment_service -> payment_service : 发送mq,topic=ItemPurch,tags=Main
                alt info订阅
                    payment_service -> payment_service : 发送mq,topic=SubRdo,tags=Main
                end
                payment_service -> payment_service : 监听mq,topic=ItemPurch,tags=Main,删除商品购买记录表：ord_t_itempurchase_order中的订单,保存订单信息到历史订单商品仓库表：ord_t_item_repository
            end
        end
        alt 异步支付
            payment_service -> payment : paymentServices.directPayment 扣费
            payment_service <-- payment : paymentServices.directPayment 返回扣费的响应
            payment_service -> payment_service : 支付等待回调
        end
        ctu <-- payment_service : orderPaymentService.payOrder 返回支付订单的响应
    end
end

alt 异步支付时等待支付回调,支付完成后再返回结果, 第2次支付等待的支付变更为,网银支付
    payment -> payment_service : payNotify.notifyStatus 支付成功异步回调结果
    alt 支付成功
        alt 喜马拉雅渠道马扣费
            payment_service -> proxy : ximalaya/distribute 同步喜马拉雅订购关系(多章节加任务队列异步处理)
            payment_service <-- proxy : ximalaya/distribute 返回同步喜马拉雅订购关系响应
        end
        payment_service -> subscribe : itemService.batchSubscribe 批量订购
        payment_service <-- subscribe : itemService.batchSubscribe 返回批量订购的响应
        payment_service -> payment_service : 发送mq,topic=ItemPurch,tags=Main
        alt info订阅
            payment_service -> payment_service : 发送mq,topic=SubRdo,tags=Main
        end
        payment_service -> payment_service : 监听mq,topic=ItemPurch,tags=Main,删除商品购买记录表：ord_t_itempurchase_order中的订单,保存订单信息到历史订单商品仓库表：ord_t_item_repository
    end
    payment <-- payment_service : payNotify.notifyStatus 返回支付完成回调结果的响应
    ctu -> order : historyOrderManagementService.batchFetchHistoryOrders 查询历史订单
    ctu <-- order : historyOrderManagementService.batchFetchHistoryOrders 返回查询历史订单的响应
    alt 微信支付轮询或次日跑上报没有查到历史订单
        subscribe_service <-- ctu : purchaseObj 点播图书返回24908
    end
end

alt 订单支付已完成
    alt 微信支付
        ctu -> ctu : 记录包月微信签约项
    end
    alt 当月扣费是否达标
        ctu -> ctu : 记录包月首次访问话单
    end
    alt 享受会员折扣
        ctu -> ctu : 记录包月首次访问话单：享受会员折扣
    end
end

alt 抽奖活动为抽中图书包，首发订单抽中图书
    ctu -> campaign : lotteryCampaignService.setLotteryInfo 更新中奖信息为已完成
    ctu <-- campaign : lotteryCampaignService.setLotteryInfo 返回更新中奖信息为已完成的响应
end

alt 连续订阅
    alt 支付方式是和包话费或SDK支付(210)且,和包绑定或话费或SDK支付(214)小额免密支付或sdk支付(228)
        ctu -> ctu : continuousBilling/sunContinuousCharging 快捷支付
        ctu <-- ctu : continuousBilling/sunContinuousCharging 返回快捷支付的响应
    end
end

subscribe_service <-- ctu : purchaseObj 点播图书返回
ms_trade <-- subscribe_service : purchaseObj 返回点播图书的响应
user <-- ms_trade : wapPurchase 返回点播图书的响应

@enduml
```
